Have to / Has to  ·  A2
Have to / Has to: 4 Levels!
Have to / Has to
Name: Date:
DOK 1 · Recall
DOK 1 — Choose the Right Answer!
Let's see what you know! 🎯

She ___ go to school every day.

a) have to
b) has to
c) have

I ___ finish my homework tonight.

a) has to
b) have
c) have to

He ___ wake up early every morning.

a) have to
b) has to
c) has

Do they ___ wear a uniform at school?

a) has to
b) to have
c) have to
DOK 2 · Apply
DOK 2 — Drag the Right Word!
Drag the right word into the gap! 🧩
have to
has to
wash
study
cook
I
___
clean my room every week.
She
___
go to bed at nine o'clock.
They
___
do their homework after school.
He has to
___
the dishes every evening.
We have to
___
for the English test tomorrow.
DOK 3 · Analyse
DOK 3 — Fill in the Blank!
Think carefully and fill in the blank! ✏️

Write 'have to' or 'has to' in each gap.

He (have to) -> wake up at seven o'clock.
I (have to) -> do my homework now.
She (have to) -> study English every day.
We (have to) -> clean the classroom today.
Do they (have to) -> wear a school uniform?
DOK 4 · Create
DOK 4 — Create!
Now YOU create something amazing! 🌟

Write 4 sentences about things you and people you know have to do. Use: I have to, he has to, she has to, we have to, or they have to.

0 characters
📷 Take a screenshot of your writing and share it with your friend!
“Step into someone else’s shoes and see the world through their eyes.” SEL Inspiration for Every Learner
